content.scenarioHint: 你在超市想购买麦片，想知道目前是否有任何折扣、优惠券或赠品活动，请向店员询问促销信息。
expectedAnswers: Do you have any discounts on cereal right now?
Are there any coupons or free gifts with cereal this week?
Is there a promotion on cereal, like buy-one-get-one-free?
Could you tell me if there are any special offers on cereal?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确询问了麦片的促销信息
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当
表达自然度：符合日常英语口语习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了 discount, coupon, promotion, offer 等关键词之一

content.scenarioHint: 今天面包有促销吗？你要询问促销活动的详细信息
expectedAnswers: Is there a special deal on bread today?
Do you have any discounts or promotions on bread?
Are there any free gifts with the purchase of bread?
evaluationCriteria: 是否正确表达了询问促销活动的意图
是否符合英语口语习惯

content.speakerText: Do you have any ongoing promotions this week?
content.speakerTextCn: 这周有什么持续促销活动吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, we have a weekly sale on dairy products — 20% off all cheese and yogurt.
There's a flash sale on fruits and vegetables every Friday.
We don't have fixed promotions, but signing up for our app gives you exclusive weekly deals.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：清晰说明是否有促销及具体内容
语言准确性：使用恰当时态（现在进行时、一般现在时）和促销术语
表达自然度：包含场景关键词如 'weekly sale', 'flash sale', 'exclusive deals', 'signing up'
